task_description: Implement Deep Memory RAG: embed behavioral observations into vectors using Vertex AI text-embedding-004, retrieve semantically relevant memories before each query, and inject them into agent prompts for truly personalized responses.

verification.summary: 173 tests pass (26 new RAG tests + 147 existing). 2 pre-existing failures in test_user_context.py are unrelated. Frontend build compiles successfully. Review issues addressed: embeddings in subcollection (Firestore size fix), model caching, similarity threshold 0.3, fire-and-forget writes, asyncio.to_thread for blocking SDK call.
